title: MOTION (RODRIGUEZ for PADILLA - HERNANDEZ) relative to amending the Council action of October 21, 2025, Council file No. (CF) 18-0553-S2, regarding a revocable permit to ICON Panorama for commencing construction in the public right-of-way at 14665-14697 West Roscoe Boulevard, 8300-8406 North Cedros Avenue, and 8321-8413 North Tobias Avenue.

appearances.section: Items for which Public Hearings Have Not Been Held - (10 Votes Required for Consideration)
appearances.recommendation: AMEND the Council action of October 21, 2025 relative to the approval of the Public Works Committee Report relative to issuing a revocable permit to ICON Panorama for commencing construction in the public right-of-way at 14665-14697 West Roscoe Boulevard, 8300-8406 North Cedros Avenue, and 8321-8413 North Tobias Avenue (CF 18-0553-S2), to add the following recommendations: Dedicate the new alley per a separate instrument and improve it to the satisfaction of the City Engineer. All improvements under BR206305 for the Tract 74315 conditions shall be suitably guaranteed by a bond and paying the appropriate fees. Motion (Rodriguez - Hernandez) dated 10-24-25 Council Action dated 10-22-25 Report from Public Works Committee 8-13-25 Speaker Card(s)_08-13-2025 Motion (Padilla - Blumenfield) dated 7-01-25
